title: Configure DAST scanner and authenticate
description: Set up the DAST scanner, configure authentication credentials, and verify scanner can reach all target endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: Scanner reaches target application successfully
Authenticated scanning configured with valid credentials
Scope boundaries configured to avoid out-of-scope systems
Baseline scan confirms connectivity

title: Spider and crawl application for endpoint discovery
description: Discover all application pages, endpoints, forms, and JavaScript-rendered content.
acceptance_criteria: Complete sitemap or endpoint list generated
API endpoints and AJAX calls captured
Authentication-protected pages discovered
File upload endpoints identified

title: Automated vulnerability scan
description: Run active scanning rules against all discovered endpoints covering OWASP Top 10 categories.
acceptance_criteria: All discovered endpoints scanned with active rules
Scan logs retained for reproducibility
Scan completion verified (no partial runs)

title: Authentication and session management testing
description: Manually test login, logout, password reset, MFA, and session handling for security weaknesses.
acceptance_criteria: Brute force protection verified
Session token randomness and expiry tested
Password reset flow tested for token predictability
MFA bypass scenarios evaluated

title: Injection and input validation testing
description: Test all user-controlled inputs for SQLi, XSS, SSTI, command injection, and XXE.
acceptance_criteria: All input parameters fuzzed for injection
Reflected and stored XSS scenarios tested
SQLi tested on all database-interacting endpoints
File upload tested for unrestricted upload

title: Business logic and access control testing
description: Test for IDOR, BOLA, price manipulation, workflow bypass, and horizontal/vertical privilege escalation.
acceptance_criteria: IDOR tested on all resource identifiers
Horizontal privilege escalation tested between users
Vertical privilege escalation tested between roles
Business workflow bypass scenarios tested

title: Validate and confirm DAST findings
description: Manually confirm all scanner-reported findings are genuine vulnerabilities, not false positives.
acceptance_criteria: Every finding manually reproduced
False positives removed from findings store
CVSS scores assigned and justified

title: Generate DAST report
description: Export confirmed DAST findings as a report suitable for development team remediation.
acceptance_criteria: All confirmed findings documented with reproduction steps
Remediation guidance provided per finding
Report exported in requested format
